name: Broad Bean and Vegetable Soup- Shawrbat Fool
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain beans, remove skins, and set beans aside.
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan; sauté onions, garlic, and hot pepper for 10 minutes.
3. Add remaining ingredients (tomatoes, carrot, potato, coriander leaves) and bring to boil.
4. Cover and cook over medium heat for 1 hour or until broad beans are well-cooked, stirring occasionally and adding more water if necessary.
Note: 4 cups of pre-cooked fava beans can be substituted for the 2 cups of dry beans. If using cooked fava beans, cook the soup for only about 40 minutes.
